name: decentralized-trust-platform
description: Decentralized Enterprise Trust Platform - A next-generation DID-based authentication and authorization system

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,PORTAL,WALLET" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix portal run dev" "cd wallet && npx expo start"
scripts.setup: yarn install && yarn workspace contracts compile

author: DecentralizedTrustPlatform Team
